blocks.title: Simple While Loop
⚠️ Infinite Loops
blocks.content: Always make sure your while loop will eventually become false! If you forget to update the variable, you'll create an infinite loop that never stops.

blocks.title: Guessing Game

blocks.instruction: Complete the while loop condition to run while x is less than 10:
blocks.explanation: Use < to check if x is less than 10.

questions.question: What's the main difference between for and while loops?
options: for loops are better when you know how many times to repeat
while loops can only repeat once
questions.explanation: Use for loops when you know the number of repetitions. Use while loops when you need to repeat until a condition changes.
